title: Annotations
description: A highlight or note the reader (or the fact-checker agent) attaches to a specific passage of an article, for research and verification.

articleId.description: the article this annotation is attached to

quote.description: the exact passage of article text being highlighted or annotated

note.description: the reader's or agent's comment about the highlighted passage

kind.description: 'note' (reader comment), 'highlight', or 'fact-check' — what kind of annotation this is

color.description: design-token color name used to render the highlight (e.g. 'accent'), not a raw color value

verified.description: whether the fact-checker agent has verified the claim in this passage

article.description: the article this annotation is attached to
